DBGT SITE-NEWS










New Layout Site Programming Toonami Line-Up
New layout for DBGT.COM released!. [Read Full Coverage] New staff additions, with programmers! [More Information] Cartoon Network TV Toonami Schedule [View Line-up]
Christmas Specials New DBZ T-Shirts Videos-DVD's
Special Pre-made Christmas Packages [View Packages] New Dragon Ball Z adult and youth T-shirts! [View List of T-Shirts] Brand New saga & movie video's & dvd's [view list of new items]
01/17/01--»
     Hey everyone, its Xerob, the new guy. Just like to say, I'll be making updates every other day. C'ya! BTW here's a beta preview of the flash section! [Sam (Xero) B.]
01/29/01--»
     Hello everyone! Just wanted to update a little, by telling you that cellpd.com has an official launch date! The official launch date is on February 5, 2001, so look forward to it! Please visit it as soon as you can, so that we can start the launch of it with a big amount of visitors. Thanks! CELLPD.COM
12/19/00--»
     Well, we are very pleased with the amount of hits we have been getting, which is a considerable amount. We have been growing rapidly, and hope to keep growing at this rate, as time goes on. We will be uploading the multimedia section soon, so please don't e-mail us about when it will be completed. Thanks to everyone, and happy holidays!
Christmas Wish--»
     Welcome to what we hope will be our best layout yet! We have added the new layout just in time for the Christmas holidays. Now we have something from our side to ask you guy's as our Christmas present. We really need a new system so that we can make new and better updates to the site, and as you can see, we already have one picked out, which is the image to the right. Unfortunately, we don't have enough money to buy it. All we ask is for you to visit the site, and that is how this wish can come true. Our advertisements are the ones that keep us up, so the more visits, the more money we receive, and that way we can get this new system. We will keep you updated here on how much we receive each day from our advertisement, to see how close we are towards getting this new system. And by the way, this is a custom system from alienware.com which you can visit to get a better idea of what we are looking forward to. Thanks! Goal:$7799.00 Current Status: $80.00

News Update-11/24/00 [Ruben Rodas]
